summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3 CaseFlow features including AI Copilot templates, demo mode, role-based navigation, and bright theme overhaul. All major functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and all 17 endpoints
Case Worker login (caseworker@demo.caseflow.io / demo1234) with correct role-based navigation
Volunteer login (volunteer@demo.caseflow.io / demo1234) with limited access
Dashboard loads with demo data (55 clients, 136 services, 77 visits, 64 outcomes)
Clients page with search, import/export buttons, and 25+ client rows
Payments page with bright theme pricing cards
Admin Settings with all 5 tabs (Users, Invites, Vocabulary, Field Sets, Demo Mode)
Demo Mode tab shows default credentials and Load Demo Data button
Invites tab with shareable link creation and copy functionality
AI Copilot panel with 4 quick actions and 4 template buttons
AI Copilot 'Create New Client' template with confirmation dialog
AI Copilot action execution and client creation
Client detail page with tabs (Services, Outcomes, Follow-ups, Files)
Bright cheerful theme with warm cream background (#FFF8F0) and coral buttons
AI Templates API returns 4 templates (create_client, schedule_visit, log_service, add_outcome)
AI Generate Form API returns prefill data
Demo Seed API creates demo users with credentials

success_percentage.role_based_access: 100% (admin, case worker, volunteer roles working correctly)
